name: C-13 merged output uses YAML array shape with at least one `- id:` entry per §2.6 style
command:
printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  url: https://b.com
' > bundled.yaml && printf -- '- id: custom-framework
  url: https://x.com
  why_authoritative: ok
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/merge-registry.sh" --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml --bundled bundled.yaml && [ "$(grep -c '^- id:' merged.yaml)" -ge "1" ] && echo array 1>&2
